description_long: This object consists of two tall, rectangular cabinets placed side by side, each featuring three front-facing drawers. The front panels of the drawers are finished in a light wood veneer, while the sides and back are a smooth, solid white material. The drawers are handleless, giving the cabinets a modern, minimalist appearance, and the top edges are bordered with a subtle yellow trim. The drawers are partially open in some views, revealing a white interior. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, functional design suitable for storage in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or utility rooms.
description: A pair of tall, modern cabinets with three handleless wood-finished drawers each, white sides, and yellow trim, designed for practical storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing both cabinets with closed wood-finished drawers and visible yellow trim.
description_view_1: Side view with drawers partially open, revealing white interiors and the solid white side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain white backs and yellow trim, with no visible drawers or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with drawers open, showing the white interiors and the wood finish on the drawer sides.
